programme.title: 40-Foot Monsters
programme.desc: Wild Bill realizes that he has more to learn about his new boat.

programme.title: Dead-Stick
programme.desc: The captains prepare for an Arctic mega-storm to hit the Bering Sea.

programme.title: 450 Mile Storm
programme.desc: The captains must decide whether to stay or flee as a second storm hits.

programme.title: Respect Earned
programme.desc: The captains try to reach their fishing quotas as a storm blows through.

programme.title: Man Down
programme.desc: The captains deal with various obstacles as Mother Nature stirs up the sea.

programme.title: MeatEater - Bahamas Spearfishing
programme.desc: Hunter, author, cook and conservationist Steven Rinella treks into the world's most remote and beautiful regions, bringing game meat from field to table. Steve heads down to the Bahamas to spearfish with friends Kimi Werner and Cameron Kirkconnell. They explore the clear waters of the North Atlantic to bring home a wide array of fish species, including Mahi Mahi and grouper.

programme.title: Lousiana Spearfishing and Bowfishing
programme.desc: Steven Rinella returns to the coast of Louisiana to spearfish and bowfish with Ronnie Collins and Greg Fonts. With ideal conditions, Steve receives a last minute invitation from Ronnie to spearfish during the reintroduced spring Amberjack season. Afterwards, the crew stays up for a late evening of bowfishing for red drum.

programme.title: MeatEater - Into the Clouds: Sitka Blacktail Deer
programme.desc: Steven Rinella charters a float plane to drop off on a remote lake in Alaskas coastal rainforest for a solo.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Sweetest Meat: Alaskan Black Bear
programme.desc: As summer turns to fall, Steve heads into the backcountry of Alaska's Chugach Range.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Waters Edge: Waterfowl in Alaska
programme.desc: For a waterfowler's dream hunt, Steven Rinella joins his friend, wildlife biologist Brandt Meixell, on a remote trip to some untouched Alaska wetlands in search of ducks and geese. With a spread of decoys and a loyal retriever, they try to get their limit and fill their bellies with willow-spit roasted whole duck.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Rugged Peaks: Alaskan Mountain Goat
programme.desc: Every year, a handful of hunters draw a mountain goat permit to hunt the Mills Creek region of Alaskas Kenai.

programme.title: MeatEater - The New American Food Chain: Wild Pigs
programme.desc: On this trip, Steve travels to the Sacramento Valley in central California in search of a new challenge.

programme.title: MeatEater - Brotherhood, Badlands, and Pack Llamas: Montana Mule Deer
programme.desc: With a trio of cantankerous, spit-hurling pack llamas, Steven heads out.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Roughest Country: Texas Aoudad Sheep
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads into the mountainous desert backcountry of west Texas after Barbary sheep, or Aoudad. These introduced sheep from North Africa are hard to find and harder to hunt. Challenged by the harsh environment, rugged terrain, and elusive sheep, Steve finds this hunt to be one of the most difficult he has ever undertaken.

programme.title: MeatEater - Canyon Bottoms and Cookouts: Texas Javelina
programme.desc: Steven Rinella takes to the canyons of the West Texas desert in search of javelina. In this broken, rocky terrain finding these unique critters isn't easy and getting a clear shot on a skunk pig with a bow is a whole other story. But Steve is inspired by the evidence of he finds of ancient hunters that used the area to prepare a meal that honors both the animal and our hunting ancestors.

programme.title: MeatEater - Big Bucks and Small Game: Wisconsin Whitetail Deer
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads to Wisconsin to spend a few days on his buddys historical family farm to hunt small game.

programme.title: MeatEater - Big Sky, Bigger Birds: Montana Wild Turkey
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and his brother Matt load up the llamas for a backcountry spring Turkey hunt in Montana's Powder River Breaks. They will pack deep into the rugged badlands to find gobbling birds. With two tags each, there's plenty of action and camp-fried turkey schnitzel is on the menu.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Fair Chase: Arizona Mountain Lion
programme.desc: In the harsh desert Southwest, Steven Rinella has come to learn the truth about tracking a mountain lions.

programme.title: MeatEater - Crossing Borders: Mexican Bison
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads into the mountains of the Sonora Desert on a true, wild, free-ranging bison hunt.

programme.title: MeatEater - Strange Hunt in a Strange Land: New Zealand Red Stag
programme.desc: Steven Rinella is on New Zealand's South Island for a do-it-yourself, free-range hunt for the majestic red stag. But first, he needs to secure some camp meat in the form of wild lamb. Battling weather and wary game in mountainous terrain, he uses his spot-and-stalk hunting skills to discover Kiwi red stags are a trophy worthy of the wall and the cook pot.

programme.title: MeatEater - Bush Pig: New Zealand Wild Boar
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and local pig hunting expert, Darren Moore, spend a wild, action-packed day tracking down Captain Cook boars in the thick New Zealand bush. Their tools for the job include two tough little pig dogs, a knife, and some real grit. Wild pigs are dangerous critters and this is as visceral as a hunt gets. Along the way, Steve learns a new technique for field-prepping whole hogs.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Top of the Bottom of the World: New Zealand Thar Part 1
programme.desc: With the help of guide and friend Remi Warren, Steven Rinella gears up for a massive climb into New Zealand's Southern Alps in pursuit of Chamois and Tahr. The hunters will travel light and base out of an alpine hut to find animals Steve has never hunted. Things turns adventurous quickly; with an impassable glacial river between Steve and his goal. But with hard work, Steve experiences a do-it-yourself high country hunt like no other.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Top of the Bottom of the World: New Zealand Thar Part 2
programme.desc: With the help of guide and friend Remi Warren, Steven Rinella gears up for a massive climb into New Zealand's Southern Alps in pursuit of Chamois and Tahr. The hunters will travel light and base out of an alpine hut to find animals Steve has never hunted. Things turns adventurous quickly; with an impassable glacial river between Steve and his goal. But with hard work, Steve experiences a do-it-yourself high country hunt like no other.

programme.title: MeatEater - Cooking Special: Giving Thanks
programme.desc: The Pilgrims didn't get their turkey at the store and neither does Steven Rinella. On this special Holiday episode Steve cooks three enticing dishes: Wild Turkey Galantine, Smoked Black Bear Ham, and his take on the traditional Mincemeat Pie. Appetites will run large as Steve makes a special meal for his family and friends.

programme.title: Weekend Deals with MBE
programme.desc: Join Joe from MBE to discover some of the best deals happening this weekend for your Home, Fashion and Outdoor needs. Shop while you watch: just head to the Amazon shopping app on mobile and type "Shop the Show" in the search bar!

programme.title: Punk Rock God
programme.desc: Stacy and Clinton meet Patrick, a charming “brewery dad” eager to swap his t-shirts and clogs for the edgy punk rock style he idolized as a kid. Struggling with confidence, Patrick has hesitated to embrace his true self. As Clinton and Stacy guide him through this transformation, he rediscovers his identity and finally steps into the spotlight, fulfilling his teenage dream of ultimate cool.

programme.title: Powerhouse Diva
programme.desc: Clinton and Stacy’s new client, Freedom, is a two-time breast cancer survivor eager to reclaim her confidence. Seeking to embrace her inner diva, she needs help creating a style that reflects the resilient spirit she has lost. Clinton and Stacy help Freedom discover the power clothes can have on your life, giving the jumpstart she needs to enter a new chapter as a strong, empowered woman.

programme.title: Eclectic Bohemian
programme.desc: Aspiring artist Akemi has left a corporate job to pursue her dream as a visionary artist, but she struggles with personal style and craves her parents' approval. Enter Stacy and Clinton, ready to create a bold, artsy look that truly reflects her creative spirit. Together, they empower Akemi to embrace her vibrant identity, boosting her confidence to thrive as the artist she was meant to be.

programme.title: 90s Preppy
programme.desc: Clinton and Stacy welcome Selena, a goth content creator seeking a dramatic style transformation. Having worn an all-black aesthetic since middle school, Selena realizes that it hinders her ability to connect with others and looks for guidance to uncover a more approachable style that reflects her evolving identity.

programme.title: Weekend Deals with MBE
programme.desc: Join Joe from MBE to discover some of the best deals happening this weekend for your Home, Fashion and Outdoor needs. Shop while you watch: just head to the Amazon shopping app on mobile and type "Shop the Show" in the search bar!

programme.title: Passionista Soul: The Fit Verdict
programme.desc: Tune in as Passionista Soul reveals her freshest fashion finds and must-have top picks! Shop while you watch: just head to the Amazon shopping app on mobile and type "shop the show" in the search bar or scan the QR code!

programme.title: Derby Style with Madison LeCroy
programme.desc: Get Derby-ready with Madison LeCroy's chic style picks and fashion tips for race day elegance and fun. Shop while you watch: just head to the Amazon shopping app on mobile and type "shop the show" in the search bar!

programme.title: Style My Little Black Dress with Madison LeCroy
programme.desc: Madison LeCroy shares her top tips for styling a little black dress for all occasions. Shop what you see with the Amazon shopping app! Just type "shop the show" in the search bar on mobile to get started.

programme.title: Madison LeCroy Extra Edition: Save or Splurge
programme.desc: Find out if you should save the money or splurge on these beauty items. Madison LeCroy plays a game of save or splurge to make the decision! Shop while you watch: just head to the Amazon shopping app on mobile and type "shop the show" in the search bar!

programme.title: Shoppable Shorts: Pick Your Prize
programme.desc: Host Kalen Allen meets real people on the street to play games for the ultimate Amazon prizes. New episodes air Wednesday's at 7pm ET. Shop while you watch: just head to the Amazon shopping app on mobile and type "shop the show" in the search bar!

programme.title: Deep Into the Night
programme.desc: The moment the Yankees beat the Red Sox in the 2003 ALCS, the greatest rivalry in sports reaches its zenith, with the Bombers dynasty looking as indominable and inevitable as ever, and a rising Red Sox club turned aside. And in the middle of it all is Aaron Boone – a midseason addition to the Yanks from a baseball family – a truly unlikely hero.

programme.desc: Luis se ha quedado sin trabajo, por lo que buscará una nueva actividad para invitar a Silvia a salir. Por otro lado, Luismi ha llegado solo al edificio.

programme.title: La novia de Pedro
programme.desc: Pedro invita a salir a Cris, la mejor amiga de Silvia, y organiza una cita doble con Luis y Silvita. La alcaldía instala una cámara de fotomultas y los flashazos apuntan directo al edificio.

programme.title: En una relación
programme.desc: Después de un tiempo de salir juntos, Luis le pregunta a Silvia qué son y quiere que se decida de una vez. La alcaldía instala lámparas de led en el alumbrado público y la no deja dormir a los vecinos.

programme.title: Beso fallido
programme.desc: Luis invita a Silvia a ver una película a su casa, pero Pedro interrumpirá su romántico momento, pues quiere recuperar su tele. Por otra parte, Arturo jugará póker con Germán, Jorjais y Benito.

programme.title: Las pantuflas de Luis
programme.desc: Luis y Pedro hacen una apuesta para saber si se dice pantuflas o pantunflas y le preguntarán a todos los vecinos. Lorena sospecha que Benito está molesto por su nuevo galán.

programme.title: Segundo aire
programme.desc: Germán descubre que en el edificio hay una plaga de cucarachas, por lo que Magdalena le ordena que haga una inspección en su departamento.

programme.title: Número equivocado
programme.desc: Alguien grafiteó la fachada del edificio. Para retirarlo, Germán cambia el número de la entrada. ¿Recibirá Luis el paquete que espera? ¿Acudirán a pintar el departamento de Lorena?

programme.title: Magdalena y la tercera edad
programme.desc: Magdalena descubre que las personas de tercera edad recibirán tarjetas de ayuda. La familia López Pérez intenta obtener el beneficio. A Luis le molesta que Benito tenga un auto nuevo.

programme.title: Cásate conmigo
programme.desc: Comienza una guerra tras la pelea entre Silvia y Luis, sin embargo él le pide matrimonio. Lorena le pide a Germán que arregle una mesa.

programme.title: La boda
programme.desc: Luis y Silvia anuncian su boda y los vecinos los convencerán para que se casen en el edificio y ayudarán a los preparativos.

programme.title: Vecinos ruidosos
programme.desc: Los vecinos se quejan de los ruidos que vienen del departamento de Luis y Silvita, Germán intenta reparar la tubería de Lorena y los López Pérez sufren de comezón.

programme.title: Frankie regresa
programme.desc: Frankie regresa a vivir al edificio, con Lorena y con Benito, pero con la condición de que encuentre trabajo. Pero, en vez de eso, escribirá una nueva película.

programme.title: La llegada de Vanesa
programme.desc: Vanesa vuelve al edificio para visitar a los Vecinos y ponerse al corriente. Benito invita a su novia a "ver pelis" en el departamento, al enterarse de que sus papás saldrán.

programme.title: La cocina de Silvita
programme.desc: Como Luis le ha preparado el desayuno, Silvita se encargará de prepararle a su esposo un platillo espectacular.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: In a neighborhood in Mexico City, the neighbors have problems and silly misadventures with one another.

programme.title: La cosas de Don Roque
programme.desc: Germán le entrega a Vanessa cosas que le dejó don Roque, por lo que ambos lo recuerdan y homenajean. Lorena aprecia a Soledad, la nueva amiga de Benito.

programme.title: El tamalero
programme.desc: Como el tamalero no deja dormir a Luis, este le pedirá que le baje a su bocina. Ve cuántos enemigos se echará encima, por dejar sin trabajo al tamalero.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.title: Fury Road
programme.desc: An elderly driver sacrifices his own van during his desperate escape attempt. A traffic stop on a suspended driver turns up more than anticipated. Several car occupants learn it's better to tell the truth from the start.

programme.title: Fixin' to Stop
programme.desc: Deputies gradually get to the bottom of a possible stolen vehicle. A woman asks the police to help her make a clean break from bad habits. A single woman tries to plan a date with an online suitor, but the night quickly goes awry.

programme.title: Intruder Alert
programme.desc: A family gets a huge scare when a fleeing suspect finds his way into their house. Police sort out a chaotic argument between two childhood friends. A woman in a suspicious vehicle plays fast and loose with the truth.

programme.title: Pass the Buck
programme.desc: The owner of a stolen truck calls officers when he spots it in a nearby alley. A fleeing driver leads officers on a wild chase over a closed bridge. Police track down a suspect who gave a liquor store employee a phony $100 bill.

programme.title: Baby on the Way
programme.desc: A father-to-be kicks off a dangerous vehicle pursuit over something trivial. A car that ducked out of a DUI checkpoint attracts attention. Officers respond to a disturbance caused by a local man's erratic behavior.

programme.title: Carside Confessions
programme.desc: Deputies catch up to a group of teenagers enjoying a night of joyriding. A traffic stop opens the doors to recovery for a very repentant suspect. A suspect insists his car is not stolen because he did his online research.

programme.title: Out-of-Towner
programme.desc: Recovery of a stolen vehicle uncovers a weapon and a lengthy criminal history. Detectives cross paths with a car that was stolen in a carjacking. Officers speak with a man who has questionable standards regarding gun safety.

programme.title: Pit Stop
programme.desc: A man and woman are pulled over while out on a candy run. A simple traffic violation turns into a multi-vehicle police pursuit. Deputies are notified of a stolen car and find the driver in possession of an interesting tool.

programme.title: No Good, Very Bad Day
programme.desc: A distinctive tattoo reveals a wanted felon's true identity. Deputies talk to a young woman who traded one bad habit for another. A man in possession of a stolen vehicle tells officers how his day went from bad to worse.

programme.title: Palms Are Sweaty
programme.desc: A man receives an enormous break due to public health concerns. Officers are doubtful when two friends claim they were unaware of each other's actions. Police pull over a car full of people who know very little about themselves.

programme.title: Gate Crusher Pursuit
programme.desc: Cameras catch police in action as they confront crime and comfort victims.

programme.title: A Family Affair
programme.desc: A cyclist allegedly mistakes a deputy for a thief and tries to escape into the bushes. Police cut a dad some slack by not towing the family car. Two sisters catch the police's attention when they take their spat to the road.

programme.title: Fury Road
programme.desc: An elderly driver sacrifices his own van during his desperate escape attempt. A traffic stop on a suspended driver turns up more than anticipated. Several car occupants learn it's better to tell the truth from the start.

programme.title: Fixin' to Stop
